data.title: Planview Named a Leader in Strategic Portfolio Management Solutions Evaluation
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Planview®, a prominent platform for Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM) and Digital Product Development (DPD), was recently recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Strategic Portfolio Management Tools, Q2 2026. Out of the 13 major SPM providers assessed in the report across 22 criteria, Planview stood out with a perfect score of 5/5 in 12 areas, such as “Strategic Planning,” and “Business architecture/ Capability based planning.” This demonstrates Planview’s strong position in the industry and its commitment to excellence in SPM and DPD.

data.title: Ahead of Miami Grand Prix, Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids Launches Ad Campaign Urging Formula 1 to End All Tobacco Sponsorships
data.description: New advertisements expose the utilization of Formula 1 by Philip Morris International and British American Tobacco in promoting addictive products to young audiences. Set to coincide with the Miami Grand Prix on May 3, 2026, in the U.S., these ads are part of efforts by the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids. They shed light on how the tobacco industry giants leverage the F1 platform to entice fans, particularly the youth, contributing to the glamorization of harmful products. This development signifies the ongoing concern surrounding the influence of major corporations in shaping behaviors, with an estimated global audience of millions being potentially targeted.

data.title: G.M. sees profit rise with $500M tariff refund due to a recent Supreme Court ruling on tariff payments.
data.description: In light of a recent ruling by the Supreme Court in February, General Motors has announced that it is set to receive reimbursements for a portion of the tariffs it had previously paid. The decision marks a significant development for the company, potentially resulting in considerable financial gains.

Iran: The government has delegated the authority to announce terrorist groups to the Supreme National Security Council The Cabinet has authorized the Supreme National Security Council to act according to its legal duties to announce the list of terrorist individuals, groups, and organizations.

data.title: Step Right Up to Big Flavor: Chartwells K12 Celebrates School Lunch Hero Day with the Launch of "Foodie Fest"
data.description: A temporary dining program called Foodie Fest is being introduced by Chartwells K12 in school cafeterias across the country. This initiative will feature festival-inspired flavors to bring the excitement of summer festivals to school dining. The campaign will start on Friday, May 1, and is set to run for a limited time.

data.title: THE PACK ANNOUNCES FIRST FRANCHISE TERRITORY DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENTS TOTALING 18 UNITS ACROSS NORTHERN NEW JERSEY AND SOUTH FLORIDA
data.description: On April 28th, 2026, in New York, The Pack introduced its inaugural franchise territory development deals, marking a significant step where self-protection intersects with collective exercise. These agreements entail 18 units in total, allocated across two key expansion regions. Among these, eight units are planned for establishment in Northern New Jersey...

data.title: Nearly 90 percent of companies believe people will determine AI success, but far fewer are investing in related people strategies, Inaugural Aon Study Finds
data.description: In Dublin on April 28, 2026, the professional services firm Aon plc (NYSE: AON) unveiled its first Human Capital Trends Study. The study highlights a significant issue in enterprise AI strategies, with organizations acknowledging the pivotal role of their workforce in driving AI success.

data.title: PRC Appoints Cynde King as Chief Executive Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Omaha, Nebraska, PRC, a prominent player in enhancing healthcare experiences, revealed the selection of Cynde King, Ph.D., as the new President and CEO. King takes over from Joe Inguanzo, Ph.D., the founder who has guided the company since 1980. This marks a significant change in leadership for PRC, which has been a key player in the industry for over four decades.

data.title: New Research from HACE with Nearly 1,000 Respondents Reveals the Real Cost of the Latino Leadership Gap -- and a Proven Path to Close It
data.description: In the Spring of 2026, two research papers have shifted the narrative on senior underrepresentation by identifying it as a conversion issue rather than a pipeline issue. The findings directly link the solution to business growth, retention, and market performance. The research was presented in Chicago on April 28, 2026, by the Hispanic Alliance for Career Enhancement.

data.title: Chicago Author and Architect Alicia Ponce Announces Launch of Latinas in Architecture Vol. III
data.description: Renowned author, entrepreneur, and architect Alicia Ponce from Chicago recently revealed the release of "Latinas in Architecture Vol. III," marking the third installment in the "Latinas in Architecture" collection. The book series, initially introduced in 2021, showcases the stories and experiences of Latina architects. This latest volume is set to continue the series' success, highlighting the journeys of numerous Latinas in the field.

data.title: Arizona College of Nursing and Scholars Network Announce Partnership to Expand Nursing Jobs and Loan Repayment
data.description: A recent collaboration between Arizona College of Nursing (AZCN) and Scholars Network has been revealed, on April 28, 2026. The partnership intends to link nursing graduates with healthcare employers by providing them with employment opportunities and offering employer-sponsored loan repayment programs, aiming to assist in resolving workforce shortages in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Build Group Expands Luxury Hospitality Portfolio Across the West
data.description: Build Group, Inc. is increasing its presence in the hospitality sector in the Western United States and Mexico. The company is focused on constructing luxury hotels, destination resorts, and renovating iconic landmarks for ambitious owners and developers. Their projects span major cities, mountain resorts, wine regions, and coastal developments internationally. Build Group is emerging as a leading builder of luxury hotels in the West, with a strong foothold in the market.

data.title: BTG Pactual Timberland Investment Group Raises US$1.24 Billion for Largest Reforestation Fund to Date[1]
data.description: In New York, BTG Pactual Timberland Investment Group (BTG Pactual TIG), a prominent timberland manager, has successfully completed fundraising for its Latin American Reforestation Strategy, securing an impressive $1.24 billion in commitments. This achievement marks the closure of the largest reforestation fund ever recorded. By reaching this milestone, BTG Pactual TIG sets a notable example for implementing extensive reforestation and restoration projects that aim to generate lasting climate benefits, support rural communities, and enhance biodiversity.

data.title: Anthem Injury Lawyers Honors Mentor Justice Michael L. Douglas with $50,000 UNLV Fellowship Pledge
data.description: Anthem Injury Lawyers has recently revealed their commitment to donate $50,000 towards the Justice Michael L. Douglas Pre-Law Fellowship at the William S. Boyd School of Law located at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas (UNLV). This generous contribution is intended as a tribute to Justice Michael L. Douglas, and aims to support aspiring legal scholars in their educational pursuits at UNLV. The fellowship serves as a valuable opportunity for students to advance their pre-law studies and gain essential experience in the field.

data.title: Expanded agentic AI capabilities coming to SAS Customer Intelligence 360
data.description: In the latest SAS INNOVATE event held in Dallas on April 28, 2026, it was revealed that SAS is aiding marketers in improving speed of action without compromising trust by utilizing a range of distinct AI agents. With the rapid growth of AI adoption in marketing, industry leaders are grappling with the question of the appropriate level of autonomy AI should possess. This development signifies a significant shift towards leveraging AI technologies to enhance marketing strategies.

data.title: Novita AI Launches Sandbox to Secure OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and Autonomous Systems
data.description: Novita Sandbox has introduced a system-level isolation feature boasting a startup time of under 200 milliseconds. This advancement allows for the secure and efficient deployment of autonomous agent systems. The technology was unveiled in San Francisco on April 28, 2026. With AI progressing towards fully autonomous systems, there is a growing need for robust infrastructure to support these developments.
